data.content:
Implemented the lease-only identity contract end to end in Foolery. Claims and poll paths no longer forward --agent-name/--agent-model/--agent-version; lease creation remains the only place identity flags are sent to Knots. Foolery now resolves a local username for note and handoff authorship, normalizes displayed metadata for notes/capsules from lease-derived identity helpers, and restores shipped ReTakes step ownership by hydrating fallback steps from lease-audit claim history when Knots step_history is absent.

Validation on commit 6bb920fa42e2: bun run lint (0 errors, warnings only), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build all passed.
